zh.lifeSummary: Rosetta Lathan於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭。她和Fanny or Edward Higgins至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1400年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly northeastern counties): variant of   Latham  .

variants.name: Lathon
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Lathan  .

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Rosetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of   Rosa  , occasionally also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Rosetta Lathan was born about 1350, in England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Fanny or Edward Higgins. She died about 1400, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

ja.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: イギリススタフォードシュアイアストレットオン ビー ブルトン ウプオン トレント

ko.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: 영국 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴 비 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Rosetta Lathan(은)는 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Fanny or Edward Higgins(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.
